enriched_expressions.definition: A state of a machine or production line in which its operation is governed by predefined constraints or controls, ensuring that the system functions within specified limits.

base_expression.text: alarms and messages with stop at end of cycle
base_expression.label: alarm type

enriched_expressions.definition: An alarm or message that triggers a machine stop at the conclusion of a manufacturing cycle.
